steps.expression: async () => { const list = await window.api.councils.list({ viewKind: 'councilsList', page: 1, pageSize: 20, sortBy: 'updatedAt', sortDirection: 'desc', archivedFilter: 'all', searchText: '', tagFilter: '' }); if (!list.ok) { return false; } if (list.value.items.length >= 2) { return true; } const settings = await window.api.settings.getView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); const modelEntry = settings.ok ? Object.entries(settings.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider).find(([, models]) => Array.isArray(models) && models.length > 0) : undefined; const modelRefOrNull = modelEntry === undefined ? null : { providerId: modelEntry[0], modelId: modelEntry[1][0] }; const agentSave = await window.api.agents.save({ viewKind: 'agentEdit', id: null, name: `Dropdown Scenario Agent ${Date.now()}`, systemPrompt: 'Scenario helper agent.', verbosity: null, temperature: null, tags: ['scenario'], modelRefOrNull }); if (!agentSave.ok) { return false; } const createCouncil = async (index) => window.api.councils.save({ viewKind: 'councilCreate', id: null, title: `Dropdown Scenario Council ${Date.now()}-${index}`, topic: 'Validate councils overflow popover behavior', goal: 'Confirm menu opens inline instead of a sheet', mode: 'manual', tags: ['scenario'], memberAgentIds: [agentSave.value.agent.id], memberColorsByAgentId: {}, conductorModelRefOrNull: null }); const first = await createCouncil(1); if (!first.ok) { return false; } const second = await createCouncil(2); return second.ok; }

() => { const dropdown = document.querySelector('.council-menu-dropdown'); if (!(dropdown instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } const rect = dropdown.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.height > 0 && rect.width > 0; }

() => { const menu = document.querySelector('.council-menu-dropdown'); if (!(menu instanceof HTMLElement)) { return false; } const text = menu.textContent ?? ''; return text.includes('Export transcript') && (text.includes('Archive council') || text.includes('Restore council')) && text.includes('Delete council'); }

() => { const firstCard = document.querySelector('.council-card'); const secondCard = document.querySelector('.council-card:nth-of-type(2)'); const openCard = document.querySelector('.council-card:has(.council-actions-menu[open])'); const dropdown = document.querySelector('.council-menu-dropdown'); if (!firstCard || !secondCard || !(dropdown instanceof HTMLElement)) { return { error: 'Missing elements' }; } const firstZ = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(firstCard).zIndex || '0'); const secondZ = parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(secondCard).zIndex || '0'); const openZ = openCard ? parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(openCard).zIndex || '0') : 0; const dropdownRect = dropdown.getBoundingClientRect(); const secondRect = secondCard.getBoundingClientRect(); const dropdownAboveSecondCard = dropdownRect.top + dropdownRect.height <= secondRect.top + 20; return { firstZ, secondZ, openZ, dropdownAboveSecondCard, dropdownTop: dropdownRect.top, secondCardTop: secondRect.top }; }
